summary: El empuje de la IA compensa en los mercados las dudas procedentes de Irán. Los nuevos ataques se combinan aún con las esperanzas de un acuerdo. El petróleo ofrece una minitregua que alivia la presión sobre la Bolsa, y sobre el Ibex. Leer

title: Indra acuerda la venta de su filial de consultoría estratégica al fondo holandés Waterland
summary: La división de consultoría estratégica, conocida como Minsait Business Consulting (MCB) está valorada en alrededor de 150 millones de euros. Leer

title: Empresa familiar de Madrid: urge reformar un marco fiscal dañino para ciudadanos y negocios
summary: La Asociación Madrileña de la Empresa Familiar (AMEF) denuncia la posición de "inferioridad" del contribuyente en España ante un Fisco "extremadamente poderoso" y lanza una propuesta con una veintena de medidas de cambio. Leer

title: Police enter Spain's ruling party HQ as corruption probe deepens
summary: Spanish police entered the Madrid headquarters of the ruling Socialist Party on Wednesday to demand documents as part of a corruption investigation into a former party member, judicial sources said.

title: ¡Qué calor! 18 Spanish phrases to moan about the heat like a local
summary: The scorching weather Spain gets in summer (and sometimes springtime) means Spaniards are well equipped with a colourful variety of expressions to complain about the heat, from 'sweating like a chicken' to 'it’s so hot that even the frogs carry water bottles'.

title: Mango founder's son denies pushing his father off cliff
summary: Jonathan Andic, son of the founder of the Mango clothing empire, who has been arrested in Spain as part of an investigation into his father's 2024 death, has denied the accusation of murder.

title: Spain's far-right leader meets US Ambassador to discuss government 'corruption'
summary: The meeting comes as further corruption allegations surround the ruling Socialist government and tensions between Madrid and Washington remain frayed.
